name: §6Bee
description:
§8Farming Pet

§7Strength: §c30
§7Intelligence: §b50
§7Speed: §f10
§7Mining Fortune: §6[Mining Fortune]
§7Foraging Fortune: §6[Foraging Fortune]
§7Farming Fortune: §6[Farming Fortune]

§6Hive
§7For each player within §a25 §7blocks:
 §b+10✎ Intelligence
 §c+8❁ Strength
 §a+5❈ Defense
§8Max 15 players

§6Busy Buzz Buzz
§7Grants §a+30 §7of each to your pet:
§6☘ Farming Fortune
§6☘ Foraging Fortune
§6☘ Mining Fortune

§6Weaponized Honey
§7Gain §a25% §7of received damage as §6❤
§6Absorption§7.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

§6§lLEGENDARY

variants.name: BeeDazzled Bee Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to Bee
§7pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
